title: Kisuke Urahara Sky Overlay
description: A fabricskybox sky overlay of Kisuke Urahara from the anime Bleach.
body:
A fabricskybox sky overlay of the character Kisuke Urahara from the anime Bleach. It features a portrait of Kisuke with a green background throughout the entire sky. 

**This resource pack requires the mod FabricSkyBoxes. Without it, you will be unable to see it.**

![Kisuke Urahara](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68aa64031d7cb359efbcbb74f73690339498dd14.png)
